value.stringValue: 'First name: ' & [Lead].FirstName & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Last name: ' & [Lead].LastName & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Email: ' & [Lead].Email & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Organization name: ' & [Lead].Company & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Center Type: ' & TEXT([Lead].Center_Type__c) & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Enrollment capacity: ' & TEXT([Lead].School_size__c) & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'State or province: ' & [Lead].State & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Phone number: ' & [Lead].Phone

value.stringValue: OR( AND( NOT(ISBLANK([Lead].HS_First_conversion_date__c )), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT([Lead].HS_Last_form_submission_type__c ))), [Lead].HS_First_conversion_date__c = [Lead].HS_Recent_conversion_date__c, NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].LeadSource, 'User Outreach')) ), AND( ISNEW(), NOT(ISBLANK([Lead].HS_First_conversion_date__c )), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT([Lead].HS_Last_form_submission_type__c ))), NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].LeadSource, 'User Outreach')) ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_3
formulas.expression: OR( AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.HS_First_conversion_date__c} )), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!myVariable_current.HS_Last_form_submission_type__c} ))), {!myVariable_current.HS_First_conversion_date__c} = {!myVariable_current.HS_Recent_conversion_date__c}, NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.LeadSource}, 'User Outreach')) ), AND( ISNEW(), NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.HS_First_conversion_date__c} )), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!myVariable_current.HS_Last_form_submission_type__c} ))), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.LeadSource}, 'User Outreach')) ) )

value.stringValue: OR( AND( NOT(ISBLANK([Lead].HS_First_conversion_date__c )), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT([Lead].HS_Last_form_submission_type__c ))), [Lead].HS_First_conversion_date__c = [Lead].HS_Recent_conversion_date__c, NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].LeadSource, 'User Outreach')) ), AND( ISNEW(), NOT(ISBLANK([Lead].HS_First_conversion_date__c )), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT([Lead].HS_Last_form_submission_type__c ))), NOT(ISPICKVAL([Lead].LeadSource, 'User Outreach')) ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_3_pmetrule
formulas.expression: OR( AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_old.HS_First_conversion_date__c} )), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!myVariable_old.HS_Last_form_submission_type__c} ))), {!myVariable_old.HS_First_conversion_date__c} = {!myVariable_old.HS_Recent_conversion_date__c}, NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.LeadSource}, 'User Outreach')) ), AND( ISNEW(), NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_old.HS_First_conversion_date__c} )), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!myVariable_old.HS_Last_form_submission_type__c} ))), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.LeadSource}, 'User Outreach')) ) )
